title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Company Description**

 Crazy GreenLife LLP is committed to revolutionizing the fashion industry in India by addressing the pressing issue of textile waste. Through innovative solutions like thrifting, upcycling, renting, and recycling, the company aims to promote sustainable fashion and reduce the environmental impact of the industry. While still in its early stages, Crazy GreenLife is creating a platform that encourages individuals to make eco\\-conscious choices that prioritize both sustainability and affordability. With a passionate team, the organization strives to transform how India engages with fashion and sustainability.
   




**Role Description**

 This is a hybrid internship role for a Senior Software Engineer based in Bengaluru, with opportunities for partial remote work. The intern will collaborate with the development team on designing and building robust back\\-end systems, writing high\\-quality code, and implementing Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles. Responsibilities also include contributing to technical decision\\-making, debugging, and ensuring that software solutions align with the company's mission to facilitate eco\\-conscious choices.
   




**Qualifications**
* Strong understanding of Computer Science fundamentals and principles
* Experience in Back\\-End Web Development and Software Development
* Proficiency in Programming and Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP)
* Problem\\-solving skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a team
* Familiarity with sustainable technology initiatives or a passion for sustainability is a plus
* Enrolled in or completed a program in Computer Science or a related field

title: Backend Engineer (SDE3/LEAD)
description:
Job description
 



 Backend SDE3/Lead – Real\\-Time Messaging \\& VoIP
 



 Location: Hyderabad
 



  





 Type: Full\\-Time \\| Immediate Joining Preferred
 



  





 CTC: Competitive
 



  





 About YAL
 



 YAL is building a decentralized, AI\\-powered communication platform from the ground up — combining secure real\\-time messaging, voice/video calling, and intelligent fraud detection. Our mission is to deliver global communication infrastructure that prioritizes privacy, security, and performance without relying on centralized servers.
 



 We’re looking for a Backend Lead – Real\\-Time Messaging \\& VoIP to join our core engineering team and own the architecture, scalability, and reliability of the backend systems that power our real\\-time communication stack.
 



  





 What You’ll Do
 



 • Build ultra\\-reliable, low\\-latency backends for real\\-time calls, messaging, and media workflows at scale.
 



  





 • Own end\\-to\\-end backend architecture, technical roadmap, and production reliability of the communication stack.
 



  





 • Design and optimize real\\-time communication infrastructure using WebSockets, WebRTC, TURN/STUN, and media signaling protocols.
 



  





 • Design high\\-throughput event pipelines that power real\\-time signaling, analytics, and AI feature processing with minimal lag.
 



  





 • Architect distributed coordination and routing systems that maintain consistency and performance across regions.
 



  





 • Develop scalable platform primitives like RESTful APIs, identity, session management, rate limiting, and storage that serve as foundations for AI\\-powered applications.
 



  





 • Create end\\-to\\-end observability that keeps a multi\\-region communication platform predictable under heavy load.
 



  





 • Drive architecture reviews, technical decision\\-making, and backend engineering best practices.
 



  





 • Mentor backend engineers and contribute to building a strong, high\\-performing backend team.
 



  





 What You Bring
 



 • 8\\-12 years of hands\\-on backend engineering experience building and operating large\\-scale distributed systems.
 



  





 • Deep understanding of distributed systems fundamentals: consistency models, partitioning, replication, concurrency, and high availability.
 



  





 • Strong system design expertise with the ability to architect fault\\-tolerant, horizontally scalable services.
 



  





 • Expert proficiency in at least one modern backend language (e.g.,Node Js,Rust, Python, Go, C/C\\+\\+), with the ability to write high\\-performance code and lead technical reviews across complex systems.
 



  





 • Experience designing and scaling high\\-throughput or low\\-latency services, including API design, concurrency models, resource management, and performance tuning across distributed workloads.
 



  





 • Proven ability to build event\\-driven or asynchronous architectures using distributed messaging or streaming systems (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ).
 



  





 • Hands\\-on performance and observability skills, including profiling, eliminating bottlenecks, optimizing tail latency, and implementing robust metrics, tracing, and logging for distributed systems.
 



  





 • Experience leading backend initiatives or mentoring engineers with a strong ownership mindset and ability to drive architectural decisions.
 



  





 Why Join YAL?
 



 • Help shape the architecture of a next\\-generation messaging and calling platform.
 



  





 • Own and lead backend engineering for a privacy\\-first communication infrastructure.
 



  





 • Work on technically challenging distributed systems problems with a deep focus on performance and security.
 



  





 • Build secure systems that scale globally.
 



  





 • Be part of a high\\-impact team solving meaningful real\\-time infrastructure challenges.
 



  





 How to Apply
 



 Easy apply on LinkedIn or DM us here on LinkedIn, or send your CV \\+ work samples (GitHub, papers, demos) to hire.backend@yal.chat with subject line:
 



**Subject: \\[Backend SDE3/Lead – Real\\-Time Messaging \\& VoIP \\| Your Name]**
